**Date:** 2026-05-23 | **Generated by:** mapper (data mapper agent)

## Executive Summary
The researcher identified **52 unique organizations** across **39 distinct focus areas** in the AI developer tools ecosystem. The landscape spans coding agents, code editors, app builders, testing/QA, security, code review, and multi-agent frameworks. The largest clusters are in AI coding agents/CLIs, open-source AI tools, and AI app builders.
